name: ExtensionImplementationGuide_Manifest_Resource_Profile
title: R5: Profile(s) this is an example of
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`
*  R4B: `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` 0..1 `boolean, canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`
*  R4: `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` 0..1 `boolean, canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/StructureDefinition)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource`.

element.short: R5: Profile(s) this is an example of
element.comment:
Element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.profile` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The target context `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource.example[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `ImplementationGuide.manifest.resource`.
Examples: 

* StructureDefinition -> Any 
* ValueSet -> expansion 
* OperationDefinition -> Parameters 
* Questionnaire -> QuestionnaireResponse.

Examples: 

* StructureDefinition -> Any 
* ValueSet -> expansion 
* OperationDefinition -> Parameters
